channel.title: Huan Kim Tran
channel.description: Personal technical blog about software engineering, architecture, and development practices

item.title: The Case of the Missing Bot Avatar: Debugging GitHub App Commit Attribution
item.description: A debugging journey through GitHub App commit attribution: from a gray default avatar to the nomanllc[bot] badge, involving wrong email domains, mistaken IDs, and a one-line fix.

item.title: Getting Started with Astro
item.description: A beginner-friendly guide to building static sites with Astro — the modern static site generator that ships zero JavaScript by default.
